wifiRequests.text:
xerot: 
 
 Are you sure about this? In the forums page of the Tuya App they literally say the app doesn’t offer local control… 
 
 
 My mistake, you’re absolutely correct. 
 I had in mind that the Tuya app is way much faster with the Tuya wifi devices than the Tuya Cloud app from Jurgen Hei

Roger_Gorissen: 
 
 the Tuya app from Denso V.O.F does handle the cloud devices on a local manner. 
 
 
 Are you sure about this? In the forums page of the Tuya App they literally say the app doesn’t offer local control… 
 
   
      
     
     
       [APP] Tuya - Smart Life. Smart Living

I downloaded the code from Github, version 7.5.8 and installed it using CLI. Opposite to previous versions, only a small number of devices is showing a red exclamation mark. 
 The settings page does show a page to enter logon figures for the iot.tuya.con website, used for Tuya cloud devices. Should

xerot: 
 
 Are you sure about this? In the forums page of the Tuya App they literally say the app doesn’t offer local control… 
 
 
 My mistake, you’re absolutely correct. 
 I had in mind that the Tuya app is way much faster with the Tuya wifi devices than the Tuya Cloud app from Jurgen Hei

Roger_Gorissen: 
 
 the Tuya app from Denso V.O.F does handle the cloud devices on a local manner. 
 
 
 Are you sure about this? In the forums page of the Tuya App they literally say the app doesn’t offer local control… 
 
   
      
     
     
       [APP] Tuya - Smart Life. Smart Living

I downloaded the code from Github, version 7.5.8 and installed it using CLI. Opposite to previous versions, only a small number of devices is showing a red exclamation mark. 
 The settings page does show a page to enter logon figures for the iot.tuya.con website, used for Tuya cloud devices. Should
